items.summary: Extend the backend AccountListing data model to include two new optional fields: (1) rareSkinNames — a list of text strings representing tagged skin names; (2) rareSkinShowcaseLink — an optional external URL string for a showcase link. Update all relevant admin update calls (addListing, updateListing) to accept and persist these new fields. Public listing queries must return these fields so the frontend can render them.

Add a Rare Skins filter button to the marketplace rank filter bar, placed alongside the existing Unranked filter button. When Rare Skins is active, the listings grid filters to show only listings that have at least one tagged skin name. On each listing card, if rareSkinNames is non-empty, display the skin names as small badge chip tags beneath the rank; if empty, omit the skins section entirely from the card. If rareSkinShowcaseLink is set, display a small View Skins link on the card that opens the URL in a new tab.

In the Admin Dashboard Listings Management section, add a Rare Skins sub-panel for each listing. It must include: (1) a structured tag input field where the admin can type a skin name, press Enter to append it as a visible tag chip, and repeat; chips can be individually removed; (2) a text input for an optional external showcase link URL; (3) a Save button that calls the backend updateListing mutation with the updated rareSkinNames array and rareSkinShowcaseLink. The tag input must be available both when adding a new listing and when editing an existing one.

Investigate and fix why the Special Deals section is not appearing on the marketplace page. Audit the SpecialDealsSection component, the useGetSpecialDeals query hook, the backend getSpecialDeals query, and the rendering logic in MarketplacePage.tsx. Ensure the section renders whenever at least one listing has specialDeal = true, including the correct query key, stale time, and conditional rendering guard. Fix any bugs found in data fetching, response mapping, or conditional display.

Remove all Built with caffeine.ai branding text, links, and attribution from the entire frontend codebase. This includes the Footer component, any inline HTML, and any other component or page that references caffeine.ai or Built with. Do not replace it with any other attribution.

Rename the marketplace from R6 Market to Ascension's Market across the entire frontend. Update all occurrences in: page titles, Header component branding text, Footer brand name, hero section heading on MarketplacePage, the logo/banner image alt text and any rendered text overlay, Admin Dashboard page title, and any other string literal or constant referencing R6 Market.

Update the backend claimAdmin function so that: (1) if adminPrincipal is still the sentinel unclaimed value, the first authenticated non-anonymous caller is permanently granted adminPrincipal; (2) once an admin is set, any further claimAdmin call from a non-admin caller is rejected with an error; (3) an anonymous principal can never claim admin. Update the frontend Admin Dashboard so the Claim Admin button is shown only when no admin is yet set, and subsequent non-admin attempts show the Access Denied state.
